id: # --- edit stats/text/keywords freely; add new rows at the bottom. `effect` is a plain-English
# --- note of what the card does — Claude wires the real EffectDef. `art` = is illustrated art wired.

name: Brightwing Broker
text: Every minion you buy gets +1/+1.

name: Echo Warden
text: In combat, your summon effects make 1 more token.

name: Doublecast Drummer
text: Your Battlecries trigger twice.

name: Alleycat
text: Battlecry: summon a 1/1 Stray next to it.

name: Pack Scrounger
text: Deathrattle: summon two 1/1 Pups.

name: Kennelmaster
text: Each Beast you summon gains +1/+1. Avenge (3): Improve this.

name: Bristleback Matron
text: Each Beast you summon gets +2/+2.

name: Gnasher, the Overrun
text: When it kills a minion, it attacks again.

name: Spirit of the Pack
text: Deathrattle: give all your Beasts +4/+4.

name: Ember Whelp
text: Start of Combat: deal 1 to the enemy on the far left.

name: Hoard Cleric
text: Battlecry: give all your Dragons +1/+1.

name: Cinderwing Matron
text: Battlecry: give other Dragons +1/+2.

name: Razorscale Warlord
text: Battlecry: give your Dragons +2/+1.

name: Chromatic Caller
text: Start of Combat: deal damage equal to its Attack, split across enemies.

name: Nadir, Hoardlord
text: Battlecry: give your Dragons +2/+2.

name: Galewing Apex
text: Start of Combat: 3 to every enemy, then 3 more to a random enemy per other Dragon.

name: Sporeling
text: Deathrattle: give a random friend +1/+1.

name: Toxin Tender
text: Battlecry: give a friend Poison.

name: Rot Weaver
text: Each time a friend dies, give a random friend +1/+1.

name: Plaguebringer
text: Battlecry: give a friend Poison and Windfury.

name: Ghastweaver
text: Deathrattle: fill your board with random Undead.

name: Selfless Sentinel
text: Deathrattle: give a friend a Divine Shield.

name: Shield Capacitor
text: When a friendly Shield breaks, give another friend a Shield.

name: Arclight Reactor
text: When a friendly Mech Shield breaks, deal 3 to a random enemy.

name: Junkyard Titan
text: When any friendly Shield breaks, give your minions +1/+1.

name: Omega Bulwark
text: Start of Combat: give all your Mechs a Shield.

name: Soulfeeder
text: Battlecry: add Fodder to your next tavern.

name: Voracious Imp
text: Gains 2x stats from Fodder.

name: Pactstone Acolyte
text: When you consume a minion

name: Brood Matron
text: Each time a friend dies

name: Maw of the Pit
text: On consume

name: Ravening Glutton
text: On consume

name: Abyssal Sovereign
text: Start of Combat: destroy the enemy with the highest Attack.

name: Wildwood Shaper
text: Choose One: give your Beasts +1/+1; or summon two 1/1 Strays.

name: Spirit Fire
text: Give a friendly minion +3/+3.

name: Ember Pouch
text: Gain 1 Mana.

name: Bulwark
text: Give a friendly minion +0/+1 and Taunt.

name: Fred
text: A 1/1 Demon Fodder — your Demons devour it from the tavern.

name: Pup
text: A 1/1 Beast token.

name: Stray
text: A 1/1 Beast token.

name: Imp Scrap
text: A 1/1 Demon token.

name: Glimpse Beyond
text: Discover a minion from the next tier up.
